overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a character navigating a neon-lit covered commercial walkway, engaging in combat with hostile forces in red suits, and advancing through the aftermath toward a brightly lit exit. The scene features vibrant pink and cyan neon lighting, vending machines, and futuristic urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered neon-lit commercial walkway with digital signage

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the covered arcade, weapon drawn, passing illuminated vending machines and neon arches

entered.detail: curved architectural structure with bright pink neon strip lighting running along the right side of the walkway
illuminated billboard displaying advertisements on the left wall
tropical plants in large rectangular concrete planters arranged along the walkway center
tall blue kiosk or booth structure with illuminated panels
overhead metal framework with industrial piping and circular lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a covered cyberpunk commercial walkway illuminated by vibrant pink neon arches and digital billboards. The environment features potted palm trees in concrete planters and a blue vending structure, with industrial metal ceilings overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: combat zone within covered commercial walkway

events.description: initiates gunfight with hostile forces in red suits taking cover behind concrete planters

agents.ego_description: taking cover behind concrete barriers and exchanging gunfire with enemies, moving tactically through the corridor

notable_agents.action: hostile agents in red suits crouching behind concrete planters and returning fire

entered.detail: red-painted commercial entrance with glass doors and neon signage
bank of three adjacent vending machines with purple and pink lighting
low concrete walls and planters providing cover in the combat area

segments.scene_description: Combat erupts in the neon-lit corridor as the character engages hostile forces in red suits. The enemies take cover behind concrete planters while the character maneuvers around the red diner facade and triple vending machines, with muzzle flashes illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: post-combat corridor approaching exit to open area

events.description: resumes forward movement past defeated enemies toward the bright exit

agents.ego_description: advancing past fallen combatants toward the brightly lit exit at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: circular neon sign with 'OPEN' text in yellow above a vending machine
illuminated vending machine displaying food items with bright internal lighting
intense white light streaming from the end of the corridor indicating an exit

segments.scene_description: Moving through the aftermath of the combat, the character passes defeated enemies and approaches a bright exit. A prominent yellow 'OPEN' neon sign marks a food vending machine on the right, while intense white light streams from the corridor's end ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial walkway that transforms from a serene futuristic corridor into a chaotic combat zone before ending at a blindingly bright exit. It begins by gliding past vibrant pink neon arches, digital billboards, and potted palms under an industrial metal ceiling. As the camera advances, the atmosphere shifts into a violent skirmish where the character maneuvers around a red diner facade and vending machines while engaging enemies in red suits. The scene then transitions into the quiet aftermath of the fight, passing defeated foes and a glowing yellow OPEN sign. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the corridor as the colorful neon gives way to an intense, streaming white light at the far end.
